title: rubus vulgaris f. radula
intro: Rubus vulgaris f. radula, also known as the wild strawberry, is a variety of the strawberry plant that has a unique and rare form. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus vulgaris f. radula include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is also used in herbal remedies, such as salves and creams, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
